old_value: {"id":"project-LICHEN-5ix1","title":"Fix Zephyr audit firmware defects","description":"Resolve every software, configuration, startup, link, and memory-corruption defect discovered by the exhaustive Zephyr firmware boot audit. Child work must preserve runtime oracles and rerun affected target rows.","acceptance_criteria":"All audit-discovered executable firmware FAIL rows either pass their original independent runtime oracle or have a narrower confirmed external dependency; app_identity and ping_l2 pass with stack protection enabled; no test or security oracle is weakened.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"epic","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-16T19:39:22.462695Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-16T19:39:22.462695Z"}
